info.name: Fursa API
info.description:
# Fursa (فرصة) REST API

Professional Postman collection for the Laravel Fursa mobile/API backend.

## Setup
1. Import this collection.
2. `base_url` is already set to `http://fursa.test/api/`.
3. Run **Auth → Login** with seeded credentials (`volunteer@fursa.local` / `Password1`).
4. The test script stores `token` automatically for protected routes.

## Authentication
Protected endpoints use **Bearer Token** via collection variable `{{token}}`.
Header sent: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

> The API also accepts legacy `Authorization: Token <key>`.

## Body convention
All write requests use **form-data** (not raw JSON), matching Laravel multipart/form handling.

## Seeded demo accounts
| Email | Password | Type |
|-------|----------|------|
| volunteer@fursa.local | Password1 | Volunteer |
| organization@fursa.local | Password1 | Organization |

item.name: Auth
item.description: Registration, login, OTP verification, password reset, social auth, and public profiles.

request.description:
## Register Volunteer
Creates a new volunteer account and triggers activation (OTP/email) based on `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Unique account email |
| password | Yes* | Min 8 chars, at least 1 uppercase + 1 digit (e.g. `Password1`) |
| user_type | No | Must be `volunteer` (default) |
| first_name | No | First name |
| last_name | No | Last name |
| phone_number | No | Mobile number (max 15) |
| country_code | No | Dial code e.g. `+965` |
| civil_id | Yes (volunteer) | Kuwait civil ID (max 12, unique) |
| nickname | No | Display nickname |
| gender | No | `master_choices.id` for gender |
| nationality | No | e.g. `KW` |
| birth_year | No | Integer birth year |
| dob | No | `YYYY-MM-DD` — if age < 18, emergency fields become required |
| preferred_language | No | `en` or `ar` |
| profile_pic | No | Image file |
| organization_id | No | Optional linked entity profile id |
| emergency_contact_* | Conditional | Required when volunteer age < 18 |

*Password strongly recommended for normal signup.

formdata.description: Unique email for the new volunteer account.
Password: min 8 chars, include uppercase letter and a digit.
Account type. Use `volunteer` for this request.
Mobile phone number without country code (max 15).
Kuwait Civil ID (required & unique for volunteers, max 12).
Gender master choice ID (`master_choices.id`). Get IDs from Base → Get Choices.
Birth year (integer). Used with/without dob for age checks.
Date of birth `YYYY-MM-DD`. If under 18, emergency contact fields are required.
Guardian civil ID matching `/^[23]\d{11}$/` (required if age < 18).

request.description:
## Register Organization (Entity)
Creates a new organization/entity account. Profile usually stays pending until admin approval.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Unique account email |
| password | Yes* | Strong password rule |
| user_type | Yes | Must be `organization` |
| company_name | Recommended | Entity display name |
| nickname | No | Entity nickname |
| organizer_type | No | `master_choices.id` |
| registration_number | No | Official registration number |
| license_number | No | License number |
| documents[] | No | Supporting document files |
| latitude / longitude | No | Map coordinates |
| profile_pic | No | Logo/avatar image |

formdata.description: Unique email for the organization account.
Contact first name on the user record.
Contact last name on the user record.
Short nickname for the entity profile.
Organization supporting document file (repeat key for multiple).

request.description:
## Login
Authenticates with email/password and returns `auth_token`.

**Token path in response:** `data.data.auth_token`

A test script saves it into collection variable `{{token}}` automatically.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Registered account email |
| password | Yes | Account password |
| rememberMe | No | `true`/`1` extends token lifetime (~30d vs ~1d) |
| is_opportunity | No | When true, restricts login to volunteer accounts |

formdata.description: Account email. Default seeded volunteer: volunteer@fursa.local
Account password. Seeded demo password: Password1
Pass 1/true to allow only volunteer users.

exec: } catch (e) { console.log('No JSON body to parse for token'); }

request.description:
## Forgot Password
Starts password reset flow (sends OTP or reset link depending on configuration).

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Account email that will receive the reset OTP/link |

formdata.description: Registered user email to receive password reset OTP/link.

request.description:
## Verify OTP Or Token
Verifies OTP for `register` or `password` flows when `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD=OTP`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Account email |
| type | Yes | `register` or `password` |
| otp | Yes | OTP code from email |

### Response tokens
- `type=register` → `data.token` is API auth key (saved to `{{token}}`)
- `type=password` → `data.token` is reset token (saved to `{{reset_token}}`)

exec: console.log('Saved auth {{token}} from register OTP verify');

request.description:
## Resend OTP Or Token
Resends activation or password-reset OTP/link.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Target account email |
| type | Yes | `register` or `password` |

formdata.description: Account email to resend OTP/link to.

request.description:
## Change Password
Sets a new password using either a reset `token` (from forgot-password OTP verify) **or** `old_password`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Account email |
| password | Yes | New password (min 8, uppercase + digit) |
| token | Conditional | Reset token from verify OTP (`type=password`) |
| old_password | Conditional | Current password if changing without reset token |

formdata.description: New password (min 8, must include uppercase + digit).
Current password if not using reset token.

request.description:
## Check User
Checks whether an email and/or nickname is already taken.
Provide at least one of `email` or `nickname`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | One of | Email availability check |
| nickname | One of | Nickname availability on volunteer/org profiles |

formdata.description: Email to check for existing registration.
Nickname to check across volunteer/organization profiles.

item.name: Social Auth
item.description: Google/LinkedIn social login and LinkedIn OAuth exchange.

request.description:
## Social Auth
Login/register via social provider payload (Google/LinkedIn).
Returns `auth_token` at `data.auth_token` (test script still stores `{{token}}` if present).

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Social account email |
| social_media_provider | Yes | `google` or `linkedin` |
| social_media_id | No | Provider user id |
| first_name / last_name | No | Name from provider |
| social_profile_pic_url | No | Avatar URL |
| user_type | No | Defaults to `volunteer` for new users |
| civil_id | Yes for new volunteer | Civil ID |
| nickname / company_name | No | Profile fields |

formdata.description: Email returned by the social provider.
Unique user id from the social provider.
Used when creating a new user.
Required when creating a new volunteer via social auth.
Optional company name for organization social signup.

exec: } catch (e) { console.log('No JSON body to parse for token'); }

request.description:
## LinkedIn Callback
Exchanges LinkedIn OAuth `code` for LinkedIn profile + LinkedIn `access_token` (not the Fursa API token).

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| code | Yes | LinkedIn OAuth authorization code |
| redirect_uri | Yes | Exact redirect URI used in the authorize step |

formdata.description: Authorization code returned by LinkedIn OAuth redirect.
Must match the redirect_uri configured in LinkedIn app + authorize URL.

request.description:
## Public Profile
Returns a public user profile by numeric user id.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| userId | Target `users.id` (collection var `{{user_id}}`) |

## Get Account
Returns the authenticated user's account payload.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`

## Update Account
Updates account fields for the authenticated user. Supports profile image upload via form-data.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| profile_pic | No | New avatar image file |
| first_name / last_name | No | Name fields |
| email | No | New unique email |
| phone_number / country_code | No | Phone |
| birth_year / nationality / preferred_language | No | Profile meta |
| civil_id | No | Unique civil ID |
| emergency_contact_* | No | Emergency contact block |

item.name: Base
item.description: Shared lookups, banners, image proxy, and license checks.

request.description:
## Get Choices
Returns master choice options for a choice type slug/name.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| choiceType | Choice type key (collection var `{{choice_type}}`, e.g. `gender`, `org_type`) |

## Banner Images
Public list of banner images plus platform stats (no auth).

## Proxy Image
Proxies a remote image URL or a storage path for CORS-friendly delivery. Returns image bytes.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| url | One of | Absolute remote image URL |
| key | One of | Public disk relative path |
| path | Alias | Same as `key` |

## Proxy Image (CORS Preflight)
OPTIONS preflight for the image proxy endpoint.

## Check License Requirement
Returns whether the authenticated user's role requires a license upload.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`

## List FAQs
Paginated public FAQ list.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| limit | No | Page size 1–100 (default 10) |
| page | No | Page number |

item.name: Volunteer
item.description: Volunteer profile, discovery, QR, and public verification.

request.description:
## Get Volunteer Profile
Returns the authenticated volunteer's profile.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`

## Update Volunteer Profile
Updates volunteer profile fields and optionally syncs interests.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| civil_id | Yes | Civil ID |
| nickname / occupation / experience | No | Profile text |
| health_concerns | No | `yes`/`no` style flag |
| is_public / is_verified | No | Booleans as `1`/`0` |
| gender | No | master_choices.id |
| email / nationality / dob / birth_year | No | User fields |
| *_link | No | Social URLs |
| interest_ids[0..] | No | Interest IDs to sync |

formdata.description: Required civil ID for volunteer profile update.
Health concerns flag (`yes`/`no` or free text as accepted by API).
Verified flag (`1`/`0`) — usually managed by system/admin.
First interest id to sync (from interests table).

request.description:
## Get Volunteer QR Code
Returns QR code URLs / verification link for the authenticated volunteer.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`

## List All Volunteers
Searchable/paginated list of volunteers.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| search | No | Search nickname/name/email |
| page | No | Page number |
| limit | No | Page size 1–100 (default 20) |

## Verify Volunteer By UUID
Public verification endpoint using volunteer profile UUID.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| uuid | Volunteer profile UUID (`{{volunteer_uuid}}`) |

Replace `{{volunteer_uuid}}` with a real UUID from a volunteer profile / QR payload.

## Get Organization Profile
Returns the authenticated organization's profile.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`

Tip: Login first with `organization@fursa.local` / `Password1`.

## Update Organization Profile
Updates entity profile fields and social links.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| nickname / company_name | No | Identity |
| sector / organizer_type | No | master_choices IDs |
| registration_number / license_number | No | Legal numbers |
| latitude / longitude | No | Location |
| nationality | No | On user |
| social *_link | No | Social URLs |

## Update Organization Documents
Syncs organization documents: keep IDs in `existing_ids`, upload new files via `new_documents[]`. Docs not listed in `existing_ids` are soft-deleted.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| existing_ids[0..] | No | Document IDs to keep |
| new_documents[] | No | New files to upload |

formdata.description: Another existing document id to keep (optional).
New document file to upload (attach file in Postman).

request.description:
## List Organizations
Paginated approved organizations (excludes current user).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| name | No | Filter by company/nickname |
| page | No | Page number |
| limit | No | Page size 1–100 |
